title: Forge TypeLayer l10n Bundle
description: Source of Truth for extension translations. Defines all allowed keys and their context.

mode.off.description: Label for 'OFF' mode in the status bar and picker.

status.bar.ready.description: Tooltip when the current file is a valid source ready for emission.

status.bar.watching.description: Tooltip when Forge is active but the current file is not an entry.

msg.noActiveEditor.description: Shown when the user triggers a command without an open file.

msg.noWorkspaceFolder.description: Shown when the user triggers a command outside a workspace.

msg.modeChanged.description: Status notification when the mode is changed. Uses {0} for the new mode.

doctor.ok.description: Report status when no issues are found.

doctor.warningPrefix.description: Header for the warnings list in the Doctor report.

doctor.runtime.description: Section header for the detected runtime. Uses {0}.

doctor.lint.description: Section header for the detected lint strategy. Uses {0}.

doctor.manifest.description: Section header for the detected entries file. Uses {0}.

doctor.hints.description: Section header for the detected config hints. Uses {0}.

prompt.gitignore.description: Question asked to add forge-temp to .gitignore.

prompt.strategy.title.description: QuickPick title for selecting build strategy.

error.binaryNotFound.description: Error when bun/deno/tsc are all missing from PATH.

info.compiling.description: Log message when a batch build starts. Uses {0} for file count.

success.extracted.description: Log message when a batch build finishes. {0}=Files, {1}=Elapsed ms.

warn.orphan.description: Warning when an import leads to a missing artifact. Uses {0}.

info.batchStarted.description: Visual separator for the start of a compilation log.

warn.zeroExtracted.description: Warning when a build finished but produced no files.

error.batchFailed.description: Header for a failed batch build log.

error.batchMessage.description: Generic VS Code error notification for batch failures. Uses {0}.

error.bundlerFailed.description: Deep error message when the bundler binary returns non-zero. Uses {0}.

error.preflight.binary.description: Error when a binary is found but fails execution test. Uses {0}.

error.preflight.filesystem.description: Error when the shadow directory is not writable. Uses {0}.

config.warn.nonStringSuffix.description: Log when a non-string entry is found in lockSuffixes.

config.warn.invalidSuffix.description: Log when a suffix doesn't follow the .*.ts pattern.

config.warn.duplicateSuffix.description: Log when a duplicate suffix is defined in config.

config.warn.allInvalidSuffixes.description: Log describing fallback to defaults when all config suffixes are invalid.

info.activated.description: Greeting log when the extension initializes.

warn.outdatedBinary.description: Warning when a binary (Bun/Deno/TSC) is found but its version is below the compatibility registry requirements. {0}=Binary name, {1}=Current Version, {2}=Required Version.
